title: Structural Health Monitoring with Edge AI
full_text:
Structural Health Monitoring with Edge AI

Introduction

This paper introduces a novel approach for structural health monitoring.

Method

We assume linear elastic behavior of the structure.

This method does not address real-time constraints.

Future work should consider energy efficiency.

Conclusion

Results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
